quality.rationale: 概念辨析题，题干截断但涉及标准时空对称性分类与基灵矢量性质

origin.question: 10.8 (i) A metric is "stationary" if and only if it has a Killing vector field $\xi$ which is timelike at infinity (the "time" direction is $\partial/\partial t$ ). There are two ways to define a "static" metric:(i) stationary and invariant under time reversal, $\partial/\partial t \to -\partial/\partial t$ , or
origin.answer: 第二定义为：度规不仅平稳，且其时间基灵矢量场超曲面正交（hypersurface-orthogonal），等价于在适配坐标系下时间-空间交叉项为零：$g_{ti}=0$（或几何条件 $\xi \wedge d\xi = 0$）。
